FIRST_PROGRAM_ID.comment: The ID of the first program this signer interacted with, excluding chain admin programs.

NUM_TXS.name: NUM_TXS

TOTAL_FEES.name: TOTAL_FEES
TOTAL_FEES.comment: The total amount of fees (in lamports) that the signer has paid on a given day. This field can be null, as only the first signer pays fees in a transaction.

PROGRAMS_USED.name: PROGRAMS_USED
PROGRAMS_USED.comment: An array containing all program IDs a user interacted with on a given day.

metadata.name: FACT_PROPOSAL_CREATION
metadata.comment: An EZ view of all proposal creations. Currently, this table is limited to only proposal creations on Realms DAO governance spaces. A space serves as a voting group for an organization, dAPP, or DAO.

PROGRAM_NAME.name: PROGRAM_NAME
PROGRAM_NAME.comment: An address that identifies the program that is being interacted with. I.E. which DEX for a swap or marketplace for an NFT sale.

BLOCK_TIMESTAMP.name: BLOCK_TIMESTAMP
BLOCK_TIMESTAMP.comment: The date and time at which the block began.

BLOCK_ID.name: BLOCK_ID
BLOCK_ID.comment: Slot for which a block can be created.

TX_ID.name: TX_ID
TX_ID.comment: A unique key that identifies a transaction

SUCCEEDED.name: SUCCEEDED
SUCCEEDED.comment: True when a transaction is successful, otherwise false.

REALMS_ID.name: REALMS_ID
REALMS_ID.comment: An address that is unique to the space or voting group on Realms.

PROPOSAL.name: PROPOSAL
PROPOSAL.comment: Address representing the proposal being voted on.

PROPOSAL_WRITER.name: PROPOSAL_WRITER
PROPOSAL_WRITER.comment: Address of the user who is submitting the proposal for voting.

PROPOSAL_NAME.name: PROPOSAL_NAME
PROPOSAL_NAME.comment: The name of the proposal that is being submitted

VOTE_TYPE.name: VOTE_TYPE
VOTE_TYPE.comment: The type of voting strategy that will be used for voting on the proposal.

VOTE_OPTIONS.name: VOTE_OPTIONS
VOTE_OPTIONS.comment: The options that will be available to users who are voting on the proposal

FACT_PROPOSAL_CREATION_ID.name: FACT_PROPOSAL_CREATION_ID
FACT_PROPOSAL_CREATION_ID.comment: The unique identifier for each row in the table.

INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.name: INSERTED_TIMESTAMP
INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.comment: The timestamp at which the record was initially created and inserted into this table.

MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP.name: MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP
MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP.comment: The timestamp at which this record was last modified by an internal process.

metadata.name: EZ_EVENTS_DECODED
metadata.comment: Contains each event that occurs on Solana where the instruction has been decoded. A transaction can consist of more than one event and not all events within a transaction will be decoded.

BLOCK_TIMESTAMP.name: BLOCK_TIMESTAMP
BLOCK_TIMESTAMP.comment: The date and time at which the block began.

BLOCK_ID.name: BLOCK_ID
BLOCK_ID.comment: Slot for which a block can be created.

TX_ID.name: TX_ID
TX_ID.comment: A unique key that identifies a transaction

SIGNERS.name: SIGNERS
SIGNERS.comment: List of accounts that signed the transaction

SUCCEEDED.name: SUCCEEDED
SUCCEEDED.comment: True when a transaction is successful, otherwise false.

INDEX.name: INDEX
INDEX.comment: Location of the event within the instructions of a transaction

INNER_INDEX.name: INNER_INDEX
INNER_INDEX.comment: Location of the inner instruction within an instruction (event)

EVENT_TYPE.name: EVENT_TYPE
EVENT_TYPE.comment: The type of event (i.e. "delegate", "withdraw") that is occurring

PROGRAM_ID.name: PROGRAM_ID
PROGRAM_ID.comment: An address that identifies the program that is being interacted with. I.E. which DEX for a swap or marketplace for an NFT sale.

DECODED_INSTRUCTION.name: DECODED_INSTRUCTION
DECODED_INSTRUCTION.comment: An instruction specifies which program it is calling, which accounts it wants to read or modify, and additional data that serves as auxiliary input to the program

DECODED_ACCOUNTS.name: DECODED_ACCOUNTS
DECODED_ACCOUNTS.comment: The accounts object within the decoded instruction

DECODED_ARGS.name: DECODED_ARGS
DECODED_ARGS.comment: The args object within the decoded instruction

DECODING_ERROR.name: DECODING_ERROR
DECODING_ERROR.comment: The error if the decoding failed

EZ_EVENTS_DECODED_ID.name: EZ_EVENTS_DECODED_ID
EZ_EVENTS_DECODED_ID.comment: The unique identifier for each row in the table.

INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.name: INSERTED_TIMESTAMP
INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.comment: The timestamp at which the record was initially created and inserted into this table.

MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP.name: MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP
MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP.comment: The timestamp at which this record was last modified by an internal process.

has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

metadata.name: FACT_SWAPS
metadata.comment: This table contains swaps performed on Jupiter, Orca, Raydium, Saber, Bonkswap, Dooar, Phoenix and Meteora swap programs. Intermediate swaps are aggregated over the DEX programs, so the values showcase the final mint/amount swap values. Ie. a swap on Jupiter that swaps SOL->USDC->mSOL->ETH would show the initial amount in and the final amount out of SOL->ETH.

BLOCK_TIMESTAMP.name: BLOCK_TIMESTAMP
BLOCK_TIMESTAMP.comment: The date and time at which the block began.

BLOCK_ID.name: BLOCK_ID
BLOCK_ID.comment: Slot for which a block can be created.

TX_ID.name: TX_ID
TX_ID.comment: A unique key that identifies a transaction

SUCCEEDED.name: SUCCEEDED
SUCCEEDED.comment: True when a transaction is successful, otherwise false.

SWAP_FROM_AMOUNT.name: SWAP_FROM_AMOUNT
SWAP_FROM_AMOUNT.comment: Total amount of the token sent in to initiate the swap

SWAP_FROM_MINT.name: SWAP_FROM_MINT
SWAP_FROM_MINT.comment: Token being sent or swapped from

SWAP_TO_AMOUNT.name: SWAP_TO_AMOUNT
SWAP_TO_AMOUNT.comment: Total amount of the token received in the swap

SWAP_TO_MINT.name: SWAP_TO_MINT
SWAP_TO_MINT.comment: Token being received or swapped for

PROGRAM_ID.name: PROGRAM_ID
PROGRAM_ID.comment: Token being received or swapped for

SWAP_PROGRAM.name: SWAP_PROGRAM
SWAP_PROGRAM.comment: name of decentralized exchange used to perform the swap

_LOG_ID.name: _LOG_ID
_LOG_ID.comment: Combination of TX_ID and event index

FACT_SWAPS_ID.name: FACT_SWAPS_ID
FACT_SWAPS_ID.comment: The unique identifier for each row in the table.

INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.name: INSERTED_TIMESTAMP
INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.comment: The timestamp at which the record was initially created and inserted into this table.

MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP.name: MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP
MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP.comment: The timestamp at which this record was last modified by an internal process.

metadata.name: DIM_LABELS
metadata.comment: The labels table is a store of one-to-one address identifiers, or an address name. Labels are broken out into a "type" (such as cex, dex, dapp, games, etc.) and a "subtype" (ex: contract_deployer, hot_wallet, token_contract, etc.) in order to help classify each address name into similar groups. Our labels are sourced from many different places, but can primarily be grouped into two categories: automatic and manual. Automatic labels are continuously labeled based on certain criteria, such as a known contract deploying another contract, behavior based algorithms for finding deposit wallets, and consistent data pulls of custom protocol APIs. Manual labels are done periodically to find addresses that cannot be found programmatically such as finding new protocol addresses, centralized exchange hot wallets, or trending addresses. Labels can also be added by our community by using our add-a-label tool (https://science.flipsidecrypto.xyz/add-a-label/) or on-chain with near (https://near.social/lord1.near/widget/Form) and are reviewed by our labels team. A label can be removed by our labels team if it is found to be incorrect or no longer relevant; this generally will only happen for mislabeled deposit wallets.

CREATOR.name: CREATOR
CREATOR.comment: The name of the creator of the label

ADDRESS.name: ADDRESS
ADDRESS.comment: Address that the label is for. This is the field that should be used to join other tables with labels.

LABEL_TYPE.name: LABEL_TYPE
LABEL_TYPE.comment: A high-level category describing the addresses main function or ownership

LABEL_SUBTYPE.name: LABEL_SUBTYPE
LABEL_SUBTYPE.comment: A sub-category nested within label type providing further detail

LABEL.name: LABEL
LABEL.comment: Name of the controlling entity of the address

DIM_LABELS_ID.name: DIM_LABELS_ID
DIM_LABELS_ID.comment: The unique identifier for each row in the table.

INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.comment: The timestamp at which the record was initially created and inserted into this table.

MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP.name: MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP
MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP.comment: The timestamp at which this record was last modified by an internal process.

metadata.name: EZ_CORE_METRICS_HOURLY
metadata.comment: A convenience table that aggregates block and transaction related metrics using various aggregate functions such as SUM, COUNT, MIN and MAX from the fact_transactions table, on an hourly basis. Stats for the current hour will be updated as new data arrives.

BLOCK_TIMESTAMP_HOUR.name: BLOCK_TIMESTAMP_HOUR
BLOCK_TIMESTAMP_HOUR.comment: The hour of the timestamp of the block.

BLOCK_NUMBER_MIN.name: BLOCK_NUMBER_MIN
BLOCK_NUMBER_MIN.comment: The minimum block number in the hour.

BLOCK_NUMBER_MAX.name: BLOCK_NUMBER_MAX
BLOCK_NUMBER_MAX.comment: The maximum block number in the hour.

BLOCK_COUNT.name: BLOCK_COUNT
BLOCK_COUNT.comment: The number of blocks in the hour.

TRANSACTION_COUNT.name: TRANSACTION_COUNT
TRANSACTION_COUNT.comment: The number of transactions in the hour.

TRANSACTION_COUNT_SUCCESS.name: TRANSACTION_COUNT_SUCCESS
TRANSACTION_COUNT_SUCCESS.comment: The number of successful transactions in the hour.

TRANSACTION_COUNT_FAILED.name: TRANSACTION_COUNT_FAILED
TRANSACTION_COUNT_FAILED.comment: The number of failed transactions in the hour.

UNIQUE_SIGNERS_COUNT.name: UNIQUE_SIGNERS_COUNT
UNIQUE_SIGNERS_COUNT.comment: The count of unique first signers for transactions in the hour.

TOTAL_FEES_NATIVE.name: TOTAL_FEES_NATIVE
TOTAL_FEES_NATIVE.comment: The sum of all fees in the hour, in Lamports.

TOTAL_FEES_USD.name: TOTAL_FEES_USD
TOTAL_FEES_USD.comment: The sum of all fees in the hour, in USD.

EZ_CORE_METRICS_HOURLY_ID.name: EZ_CORE_METRICS_HOURLY_ID
EZ_CORE_METRICS_HOURLY_ID.comment: The unique identifier for each row in the table.

INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.name: INSERTED_TIMESTAMP
INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.comment: The timestamp at which the record was initially created and inserted into this table.

MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP.name: MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP
MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP.comment: The timestamp at which this record was last modified by an internal process.

metadata.name: FACT_REWARDS_FEE
metadata.comment: Vote and non-vote fee rewards sent to the leader of a block. The leader receives 1/2 the total fees paid in the block.

BLOCK_TIMESTAMP.name: BLOCK_TIMESTAMP
BLOCK_TIMESTAMP.comment: The date and time at which the block began.

BLOCK_ID.name: BLOCK_ID
BLOCK_ID.comment: Slot for which a block can be created.

EPOCH_EARNED.name: EPOCH_EARNED
EPOCH_EARNED.comment: The epoch that rewards were recieved for. Staking and voting rewards for an epoch are recieved in the first block of the following epoch, so this would identify the prior epoch, which is where the rewards were determined. Fee and rent rewards are determined in the epoch they are recieved.

REWARD_AMOUNT_SOL.name: REWARD_AMOUNT_SOL
REWARD_AMOUNT_SOL.comment: The number of tokens sent during an event

POST_BALANCE_SOL.name: POST_BALANCE_SOL
POST_BALANCE_SOL.comment: The amount of SOL in the account after event

FACT_REWARDS_FEE_ID.name: FACT_REWARDS_FEE_ID
FACT_REWARDS_FEE_ID.comment: A unique identifier for the record.

MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP.name: MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP
MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP.comment: The timestamp at which this record was last modified by an internal process.

INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.name: INSERTED_TIMESTAMP
INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.comment: The timestamp at which the record was initially created and inserted into this table.

DIM_EPOCH_ID.name: DIM_EPOCH_ID
DIM_EPOCH_ID.comment: Join key to the dim_epoch table

metadata.name: FACT_NFT_BURN_ACTIONS
metadata.comment: Contains information on all burn events for NFTs.

BLOCK_ID.name: BLOCK_ID
BLOCK_ID.comment: Slot for which a block can be created.

BLOCK_TIMESTAMP.name: BLOCK_TIMESTAMP
BLOCK_TIMESTAMP.comment: The date and time at which the block began.

TX_ID.name: TX_ID
TX_ID.comment: A unique key that identifies a transaction

SUCCEEDED.name: SUCCEEDED
SUCCEEDED.comment: True when a transaction is successful, otherwise false.

INDEX.name: INDEX
INDEX.comment: Location of the event within the instructions of a transaction

INNER_INDEX.name: INNER_INDEX
INNER_INDEX.comment: Location of the event within the inner instructions of a transaction

EVENT_TYPE.name: EVENT_TYPE
EVENT_TYPE.comment: The type of event (i.e. "delegate", "withdraw") that is occurring

MINT.name: MINT
MINT.comment: Unique address representing a specific token

BURN_AMOUNT.name: BURN_AMOUNT
BURN_AMOUNT.comment: The number of tokens burned during an event

BURN_AUTHORITY.name: BURN_AUTHORITY
BURN_AUTHORITY.comment: The account address with authority to confirm burn event

SIGNERS.name: SIGNERS
SIGNERS.comment: List of accounts that signed the transaction

DECIMAL.name: DECIMAL
DECIMAL.comment: Number of decimals in the token value, need to divide amount by 10^decimal

MINT_STANDARD_TYPE.name: MINT_STANDARD_TYPE
MINT_STANDARD_TYPE.comment: The type of mint following Metaplex mint standards

FACT_NFT_BURN_ACTIONS_ID.name: FACT_NFT_BURN_ACTIONS_ID
FACT_NFT_BURN_ACTIONS_ID.comment: The unique identifier for each row in the table.

INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.name: INSERTED_TIMESTAMP
INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.comment: The timestamp at which the record was initially created and inserted into this table.

MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP.name: MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP
MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP.comment: The timestamp at which this record was last modified by an internal process.

metadata.name: FACT_VOTE_ACCOUNTS
metadata.comment: This table contains data for each vote account by epoch, including the validator's public key, voting weight, commission rate, and related information.

VOTE_PUBKEY.name: VOTE_PUBKEY
VOTE_PUBKEY.comment: Public key for the vote account

NODE_PUBKEY.name: NODE_PUBKEY
NODE_PUBKEY.comment: pubkey for the Solana validator node

AUTHORIZED_VOTER.name: AUTHORIZED_VOTER
AUTHORIZED_VOTER.comment: Account responsible for signing vote transactions

AUTHORIZED_WITHDRAWER.name: AUTHORIZED_WITHDRAWER
AUTHORIZED_WITHDRAWER.comment: Account responsible for signing stake withdrawal transactions

COMMISSION.name: COMMISSION
COMMISSION.comment: % of rewards payout to the vote account

EPOCH_CREDITS.name: EPOCH_CREDITS
EPOCH_CREDITS.comment: Credits earned by the end of epochs, containing epoch/credits/previous credits

LAST_EPOCH_ACTIVE.name: LAST_EPOCH_ACTIVE
LAST_EPOCH_ACTIVE.comment: last epoch when vote account was active

LAST_TIMESTAMP.name: LAST_TIMESTAMP
LAST_TIMESTAMP.comment: The timestamp when last slot was voted on

PRIOR_VOTERS.name: PRIOR_VOTERS
PRIOR_VOTERS.comment: Prior voters for the vote account

OWNER.name: OWNER
OWNER.comment: Program account that owns the vote account

RENT_EPOCH.name: RENT_EPOCH
RENT_EPOCH.comment: Epoch at which this account will next owe rent

FACT_VOTE_ACCOUNTS_ID.name: FACT_VOTE_ACCOUNTS_ID
FACT_VOTE_ACCOUNTS_ID.comment: The unique identifier for each row in the table.

INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.name: INSERTED_TIMESTAMP
INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.comment: The timestamp at which the record was initially created and inserted into this table.

MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP.name: MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP
MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP.comment: The timestamp at which this record was last modified by an internal process.

metadata.name: EZ_SIGNERS
metadata.comment: A table that contains aggregate information about addresses that have signed transactions.

SIGNER.name: SIGNER
SIGNER.comment: The address of the user that initiated the transaction

FIRST_TX_DATE.name: FIRST_TX_DATE
FIRST_TX_DATE.comment: The first date that the wallet performed a transaction on.

FIRST_PROGRAM_ID.name: FIRST_PROGRAM_ID
FIRST_PROGRAM_ID.comment: The ID of the first program this signer interacted with, excluding chain admin programs.

LAST_TX_DATE.name: LAST_TX_DATE
LAST_TX_DATE.comment: The date of the most recent transaction the signer has performed.

LAST_PROGRAM_ID.name: LAST_PROGRAM_ID
LAST_PROGRAM_ID.comment: The ID of the last program this signer interacted with, excluding chain admin programs.

NUM_DAYS_ACTIVE.name: NUM_DAYS_ACTIVE
NUM_DAYS_ACTIVE.comment: A count of the total number of unique days that this signer has performed a transaction.

NUM_TXS.name: NUM_TXS
NUM_TXS.comment: The total number of distinct transactions initiated by this signer.

TOTAL_FEES.name: TOTAL_FEES
TOTAL_FEES.comment: The total amount of fees (in lamports) that the signer has paid on a given day. This field can be null, as only the first signer pays fees in a transaction.

PROGRAMS_USED.name: PROGRAMS_USED
PROGRAMS_USED.comment: An array containing all program IDs a user interacted with on a given day.

EZ_SIGNERS_ID.name: EZ_SIGNERS_ID
EZ_SIGNERS_ID.comment: The unique identifier for each row in the table.

INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.name: INSERTED_TIMESTAMP
INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.comment: The timestamp at which the record was initially created and inserted into this table.

MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP.name: MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP
MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP.comment: The timestamp at which this record was last modified by an internal process.

metadata.name: PROPOSAL_VOTES_REALMS
metadata.comment: An EZ view of all vote transactions on Realms DAO governance spaces. A space serves as a voting group for an organization, dAPP, or DAO.

BLOCK_TIMESTAMP.name: BLOCK_TIMESTAMP
BLOCK_TIMESTAMP.comment: The date and time at which the block began.

BLOCK_ID.name: BLOCK_ID
BLOCK_ID.comment: Slot for which a block can be created.

TX_ID.name: TX_ID
TX_ID.comment: A unique key that identifies a transaction

SUCCEEDED.name: SUCCEEDED
SUCCEEDED.comment: True when a transaction is successful, otherwise false.

INDEX.name: INDEX
INDEX.comment: A unique key that identifies the event's position within a transaction

PROGRAM_ID.name: PROGRAM_ID
PROGRAM_ID.comment: An address that identifies the program that is being interacted with. I.E. which DEX for a swap or marketplace for an NFT sale.

REALMS_ID.name: REALMS_ID
REALMS_ID.comment: An address that is unique to the space or voting group on Realms.

PROPOSAL.name: PROPOSAL
PROPOSAL.comment: Address representing the proposal being voted on

VOTE_ACCOUNT.name: VOTE_ACCOUNT
VOTE_ACCOUNT.comment: An account belonging to the voting wallet that is opened on a vote. Used to transfer the voting tx fee.

VOTE_CHOICE.name: VOTE_CHOICE
VOTE_CHOICE.comment: How the user voted on the proposal

VOTE_RANK.name: VOTE_RANK
VOTE_RANK.comment: The order of a user's preferred choices when more than one vote option is available

VOTE_WEIGHT.name: VOTE_WEIGHT
VOTE_WEIGHT.comment: The percent of voting power committed to the vote

_INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.name: _INSERTED_TIMESTAMP
_INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.comment: Time the record was inserted into snowflake

NFT_COLLECTION_NAME.comment: The name of the collection provided by Solscan

COLLECTION_ID.name: COLLECTION_ID
COLLECTION_ID.comment: The address of the NFT collection

CREATORS.name: CREATORS
CREATORS.comment: Creators of the NFT and what percentage of royalties they receive

AUTHORITY.name: AUTHORITY

METADATA.name: METADATA

IMAGE_URL.name: IMAGE_URL

METADATA_URI.name: METADATA_URI
METADATA_URI.comment: URL that links to the token metadata on the ipfs service

metadata.name: FACT_GAUGES_VOTES
metadata.comment: All gauge votes on Solana for Marinade and Saber. Gauges allow voting escrows to allocate the rewards of a set of liquidity mining pools.

BLOCK_TIMESTAMP.name: BLOCK_TIMESTAMP
BLOCK_TIMESTAMP.comment: The date and time at which the block began.

BLOCK_ID.name: BLOCK_ID
BLOCK_ID.comment: Slot for which a block can be created.

TX_ID.name: TX_ID
TX_ID.comment: A unique key that identifies a transaction

SUCCEEDED.name: SUCCEEDED
SUCCEEDED.comment: True when a transaction is successful, otherwise false.

VOTER_NFT.name: VOTER_NFT
VOTER_NFT.comment: NFT representing tokens for governance.  This is only available for certain types of governance.

GAUGE.name: GAUGE
GAUGE.comment: Address that determines the rewards share to give to a liquidity pool, or in the case of Marinade, the amount of SOL that should be delegated to a given validator

POWER.name: POWER
POWER.comment: Total voting power of the voter.  This is only available for certain types of gauge votes.

DELEGATED_SHARES.name: DELEGATED_SHARES
DELEGATED_SHARES.comment: Number of shares delegated to vote for this gauge

FACT_GAUGES_VOTES_ID.name: FACT_GAUGES_VOTES_ID
FACT_GAUGES_VOTES_ID.comment: The unique identifier for each row in the table.

INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.name: INSERTED_TIMESTAMP
INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.comment: The timestamp at which the record was initially created and inserted into this table.

MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP.name: MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP
MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP.comment: The timestamp at which this record was last modified by an internal process.

END_BLOCK.name: END_BLOCK

metadata.name: NFT_MINT_PRICE_GENERIC

MINT.name: MINT
MINT.comment: Unique address representing a specific token

PAYER.name: PAYER
PAYER.comment: Wallet address associated with paying for the mint

MINT_CURRENCY.name: MINT_CURRENCY
MINT_CURRENCY.comment: Currency used to pay for the NFT mint.

DECIMAL.name: DECIMAL
DECIMAL.comment: Number of decimals in the token value, need to divide amount by 10^decimal

PROGRAM_ID.name: PROGRAM_ID
PROGRAM_ID.comment: An address that identifies the program that is being interacted with. I.E. which DEX for a swap or marketplace for an NFT sale.

MINT_PRICE.name: MINT_PRICE
MINT_PRICE.comment: Price that it cost to mint the NFT in SOL or other currency.

TX_IDS.name: TX_IDS
TX_IDS.comment: set of transaction ids that has an associated mint price

BLOCK_TIMESTAMP.name: BLOCK_TIMESTAMP
BLOCK_TIMESTAMP.comment: block timestamp of the latest transaction with a mint price

_INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.comment: Time the record was inserted into snowflake

TX_ID.name: TX_ID
TX_ID.comment: A unique key that identifies a transaction

BLOCK_ID.name: BLOCK_ID
BLOCK_ID.comment: Slot for which a block can be created.

BLOCK_TIMESTAMP.name: BLOCK_TIMESTAMP
BLOCK_TIMESTAMP.comment: The date and time at which the block began.

INDEX.name: INDEX
INDEX.comment: Location of the stake pool action within a transaction

INNER_INDEX.name: INNER_INDEX
INNER_INDEX.comment: Location of the stake pool action within the inner instructions of a transaction

SUCCEEDED.name: SUCCEEDED
SUCCEEDED.comment: True when a transaction is successful, otherwise false.

ACTION.name: ACTION
ACTION.comment: Action performed against a given stake pool

STAKE_POOL.name: STAKE_POOL
STAKE_POOL.comment: Address for a given stake pool

STAKE_POOL_WITHDRAW_AUTHORITY.name: STAKE_POOL_WITHDRAW_AUTHORITY
STAKE_POOL_WITHDRAW_AUTHORITY.comment: System address with authority to withdraw from stake pool

STAKE_POOL_DEPOSIT_AUTHORITY.name: STAKE_POOL_DEPOSIT_AUTHORITY
STAKE_POOL_DEPOSIT_AUTHORITY.comment: System address with authority to deposit into stake pool

ADDRESS.name: ADDRESS
ADDRESS.comment: Wallet address initiating the deposit/stake or withdraw/unstake

RESERVE_STAKE_ADDRESS.name: RESERVE_STAKE_ADDRESS
RESERVE_STAKE_ADDRESS.comment: Address holding the reserved stake pool SOL

AMOUNT.name: AMOUNT
AMOUNT.comment: Amount of SOL being deposited/staked or withdrawn/unstaked

_INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.name: _INSERTED_TIMESTAMP
_INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.comment: Time the record was inserted into snowflake

_UNIQUE_KEY.name: _UNIQUE_KEY
_UNIQUE_KEY.comment: Concatenation of columns to be used on merge for incremental loads

metadata.name: EZ_STAKING_LP_ACTIONS
metadata.comment: EZ table for staking & LP actions that contains additional information about the validator.

BLOCK_ID.name: BLOCK_ID
BLOCK_ID.comment: Slot for which a block can be created.

BLOCK_TIMESTAMP.name: BLOCK_TIMESTAMP
BLOCK_TIMESTAMP.comment: The date and time at which the block began.

TX_ID.name: TX_ID
TX_ID.comment: A unique key that identifies a transaction

SUCCEEDED.name: SUCCEEDED
SUCCEEDED.comment: True when a transaction is successful, otherwise false.

INDEX.name: INDEX
INDEX.comment: Location of the event within the instructions of a transaction

EVENT_TYPE.name: EVENT_TYPE
EVENT_TYPE.comment: The type of event (i.e. "delegate", "withdraw") that is occurring

SIGNERS.name: SIGNERS
SIGNERS.comment: List of accounts that signed the transaction

STAKE_AUTHORITY.name: STAKE_AUTHORITY
STAKE_AUTHORITY.comment: The wallet address of the user who initialized the transaction.

STAKE_ACCOUNT.name: STAKE_ACCOUNT
STAKE_ACCOUNT.comment: An account address containing balances of staked SOL that belongs to the stake authority.

PRE_TX_STAKED_BALANCE.name: PRE_TX_STAKED_BALANCE
PRE_TX_STAKED_BALANCE.comment: The amount of Solana belonging to the stake account before the transaction.

POST_TX_STAKED_BALANCE.name: POST_TX_STAKED_BALANCE
POST_TX_STAKED_BALANCE.comment: The amount of Solana belonging to the stake account after the transaction.

VOTE_ACCOUNT.name: VOTE_ACCOUNT
VOTE_ACCOUNT.comment: A voting account belonging to the validator.

NODE_PUBKEY.name: NODE_PUBKEY
NODE_PUBKEY.comment: A unique key belonging to the validator node.

VALIDATOR_RANK.name: VALIDATOR_RANK
VALIDATOR_RANK.comment: The rank of the validator by amount of delegated SOL.

COMMISSION.name: COMMISSION
COMMISSION.comment: The percentage of staked earnings given to the validator.

EZ_STAKING_LP_ACTIONS_ID.name: EZ_STAKING_LP_ACTIONS_ID
EZ_STAKING_LP_ACTIONS_ID.comment: The unique identifier for each row in the table.

INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.name: INSERTED_TIMESTAMP
INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.comment: The timestamp at which the record was initially created and inserted into this table.

MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP.name: MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP
MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP.comment: The timestamp at which this record was last modified by an internal process.

metadata.comment: Table for staking & LP actions that contains additional information about the validator.

BLOCK_ID.name: BLOCK_ID
BLOCK_ID.comment: Slot for which a block can be created.

BLOCK_TIMESTAMP.name: BLOCK_TIMESTAMP
BLOCK_TIMESTAMP.comment: The date and time at which the block began.

TX_ID.name: TX_ID
TX_ID.comment: A unique key that identifies a transaction

SUCCEEDED.name: SUCCEEDED
SUCCEEDED.comment: True when a transaction is successful, otherwise false.

INDEX.name: INDEX
INDEX.comment: Location of the event within the instructions of a transaction

EVENT_TYPE.name: EVENT_TYPE
EVENT_TYPE.comment: The type of event (i.e. "delegate", "withdraw") that is occurring

SIGNERS.name: SIGNERS
SIGNERS.comment: List of accounts that signed the transaction

STAKE_AUTHORITY.name: STAKE_AUTHORITY
STAKE_AUTHORITY.comment: The wallet address of the user who initialized the transaction.

STAKE_ACCOUNT.name: STAKE_ACCOUNT
STAKE_ACCOUNT.comment: An account address containing balances of staked SOL that belongs to the stake authority.

PRE_TX_STAKED_BALANCE.name: PRE_TX_STAKED_BALANCE
PRE_TX_STAKED_BALANCE.comment: The amount of Solana belonging to the stake account before the transaction.

POST_TX_STAKED_BALANCE.name: POST_TX_STAKED_BALANCE
POST_TX_STAKED_BALANCE.comment: The amount of Solana belonging to the stake account after the transaction.

VOTE_ACCOUNT.name: VOTE_ACCOUNT
VOTE_ACCOUNT.comment: A voting account belonging to the validator.

NODE_PUBKEY.name: NODE_PUBKEY
NODE_PUBKEY.comment: A unique key belonging to the validator node.

VALIDATOR_RANK.name: VALIDATOR_RANK
VALIDATOR_RANK.comment: The rank of the validator by amount of delegated SOL.

COMMISSION.name: COMMISSION
COMMISSION.comment: The percentage of staked earnings given to the validator.

REWARD_AMOUNT_SOL.name: REWARD_AMOUNT_SOL
REWARD_AMOUNT_SOL.comment: The number of tokens sent during an event

POST_BALANCE_SOL.name: POST_BALANCE_SOL
POST_BALANCE_SOL.comment: The amount of SOL in the account after event

EPOCH_EARNED.name: EPOCH_EARNED
EPOCH_EARNED.comment: The epoch that rewards were recieved for. Staking and voting rewards for an epoch are recieved in the first block of the following epoch, so this would identify the prior epoch, which is where the rewards were determined. Fee and rent rewards are determined in the epoch they are recieved.

STAKE_POOL.name: STAKE_POOL
STAKE_POOL.comment: Address for a given stake pool

STAKE_POOL_WITHDRAW_AUTHORITY.name: STAKE_POOL_WITHDRAW_AUTHORITY
STAKE_POOL_WITHDRAW_AUTHORITY.comment: System address with authority to withdraw from stake pool

STAKE_POOL_DEPOSIT_AUTHORITY.name: STAKE_POOL_DEPOSIT_AUTHORITY
STAKE_POOL_DEPOSIT_AUTHORITY.comment: System address with authority to deposit into stake pool

ADDRESS.name: ADDRESS
ADDRESS.comment: Wallet address initiating the deposit/stake or withdraw/unstake

RESERVE_STAKE_ADDRESS.name: RESERVE_STAKE_ADDRESS
RESERVE_STAKE_ADDRESS.comment: Address holding the reserved stake pool SOL

AMOUNT.name: AMOUNT
AMOUNT.comment: Amount of SOL being deposited/staked or withdrawn/unstaked

_INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.name: _INSERTED_TIMESTAMP
_INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.comment: Time the record was inserted into snowflake

metadata.name: FACT_REWARDS_VOTING
metadata.comment: Rewards recieved by vote accounts/validators. These are sent once in the beginning of an epoch, for rewards earned by activity in the previous epoch.

BLOCK_TIMESTAMP.name: BLOCK_TIMESTAMP
BLOCK_TIMESTAMP.comment: The date and time at which the block began.

BLOCK_ID.name: BLOCK_ID
BLOCK_ID.comment: Slot for which a block can be created.

EPOCH_EARNED.name: EPOCH_EARNED
EPOCH_EARNED.comment: The epoch that rewards were recieved for. Staking and voting rewards for an epoch are recieved in the first block of the following epoch, so this would identify the prior epoch, which is where the rewards were determined. Fee and rent rewards are determined in the epoch they are recieved.

REWARD_AMOUNT_SOL.name: REWARD_AMOUNT_SOL
REWARD_AMOUNT_SOL.comment: The number of tokens sent during an event

POST_BALANCE_SOL.name: POST_BALANCE_SOL
POST_BALANCE_SOL.comment: The amount of SOL in the account after event

FACT_REWARDS_VOTING_ID.name: FACT_REWARDS_VOTING_ID
FACT_REWARDS_VOTING_ID.comment: A unique identifier for the record.

MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP.name: MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP
MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP.comment: The timestamp at which this record was last modified by an internal process.

INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.name: INSERTED_TIMESTAMP
INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.comment: The timestamp at which the record was initially created and inserted into this table.

DIM_EPOCH_ID.name: DIM_EPOCH_ID
DIM_EPOCH_ID.comment: Join key to the dim_epoch table

metadata.name: FACT_EVENTS
metadata.comment: Contains each event that occurs on Solana. A transaction can consist of more than one event.

BLOCK_TIMESTAMP.name: BLOCK_TIMESTAMP
BLOCK_TIMESTAMP.comment: The date and time at which the block began.

BLOCK_ID.name: BLOCK_ID
BLOCK_ID.comment: Slot for which a block can be created.

TX_ID.name: TX_ID
TX_ID.comment: A unique key that identifies a transaction

SIGNERS.name: SIGNERS
SIGNERS.comment: List of accounts that signed the transaction

SUCCEEDED.name: SUCCEEDED
SUCCEEDED.comment: True when a transaction is successful, otherwise false.

INDEX.name: INDEX
INDEX.comment: A unique key that identifies the event's position within a transaction

EVENT_TYPE.name: EVENT_TYPE
EVENT_TYPE.comment: The type of event (i.e. "delegate", "withdraw") that is occurring

PROGRAM_ID.name: PROGRAM_ID
PROGRAM_ID.comment: An address that identifies the program that is being interacted with. I.E. which DEX for a swap or marketplace for an NFT sale.

INSTRUCTION.name: INSTRUCTION
INSTRUCTION.comment: Specifies which program it is calling, which accounts it wants to read or modify, and additional data that serves as auxiliary input to the program

INNER_INSTRUCTION.name: INNER_INSTRUCTION
INNER_INSTRUCTION.comment: A call from one smart contract program to another

FACT_EVENTS_ID.name: FACT_EVENTS_ID
FACT_EVENTS_ID.comment: The unique identifier for each row in the table.

INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.name: INSERTED_TIMESTAMP
INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.comment: The timestamp at which the record was initially created and inserted into this table.

MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP.comment: The timestamp at which this record was last modified by an internal process.

BLOCK_ID.comment: Slot for which a block can be created.

BLOCK_TIMESTAMP.name: BLOCK_TIMESTAMP
BLOCK_TIMESTAMP.comment: The date and time at which the block began.

TX_ID.name: TX_ID
TX_ID.comment: A unique key that identifies a transaction

SUCCEEDED.name: SUCCEEDED
SUCCEEDED.comment: True when a transaction is successful, otherwise false.

INDEX.name: INDEX
INDEX.comment: Location of the event within the instructions of a transaction

INNER_INDEX.name: INNER_INDEX
INNER_INDEX.comment: Location of the event within the inner instructions of a transaction

EVENT_TYPE.name: EVENT_TYPE
EVENT_TYPE.comment: The type of event (i.e. "delegate", "withdraw") that is occurring

MINT.name: MINT
MINT.comment: Unique address representing a specific token

MINT_AUTHORITY.name: MINT_AUTHORITY
MINT_AUTHORITY.comment: The address of account authorizing the mint

SIGNERS.name: SIGNERS
SIGNERS.comment: List of accounts that signed the transaction

DECIMAL.name: DECIMAL
DECIMAL.comment: Number of decimals in the token value, need to divide amount by 10^decimal

MINT_STANDARD_TYPE.name: MINT_STANDARD_TYPE
MINT_STANDARD_TYPE.comment: The type of mint following Metaplex mint standards

FACT_NFT_MINT_ACTIONS_ID.name: FACT_NFT_MINT_ACTIONS_ID
FACT_NFT_MINT_ACTIONS_ID.comment: The unique identifier for each row in the table.

metadata.name: FACT_REWARDS_STAKING
metadata.comment: Rewards recieved by stake accounts/delegators. These are sent once in the beginning of an epoch, for rewards earned by activity in the previous epoch.

BLOCK_TIMESTAMP.name: BLOCK_TIMESTAMP
BLOCK_TIMESTAMP.comment: The date and time at which the block began.

BLOCK_ID.name: BLOCK_ID
BLOCK_ID.comment: Slot for which a block can be created.

EPOCH_EARNED.name: EPOCH_EARNED
EPOCH_EARNED.comment: The epoch that rewards were recieved for. Staking and voting rewards for an epoch are recieved in the first block of the following epoch, so this would identify the prior epoch, which is where the rewards were determined. Fee and rent rewards are determined in the epoch they are recieved.

REWARD_AMOUNT_SOL.name: REWARD_AMOUNT_SOL
REWARD_AMOUNT_SOL.comment: The number of tokens sent during an event

POST_BALANCE_SOL.name: POST_BALANCE_SOL
POST_BALANCE_SOL.comment: The amount of SOL in the account after event

FACT_REWARDS_STAKING_ID.name: FACT_REWARDS_STAKING_ID
FACT_REWARDS_STAKING_ID.comment: A unique identifier for the record.

MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP.name: MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP
MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP.comment: The timestamp at which this record was last modified by an internal process.

INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.name: INSERTED_TIMESTAMP
INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.comment: The timestamp at which the record was initially created and inserted into this table.

DIM_EPOCH_ID.name: DIM_EPOCH_ID
DIM_EPOCH_ID.comment: Join key to the dim_epoch table

TOTAL_FEES.name: TOTAL_FEES

LAST_PROGRAM_ID.name: LAST_PROGRAM_ID

UNIQUE_PROGRAM_IDS.name: UNIQUE_PROGRAM_IDS
UNIQUE_PROGRAM_IDS.comment: An array containing all program IDs a user interacted with on a given day.

BLOCK_ID.name: BLOCK_ID

BLOCK_TIMESTAMP.name: BLOCK_TIMESTAMP
BLOCK_TIMESTAMP.comment: The date and time at which the block began.

TX_ID.name: TX_ID
TX_ID.comment: A unique key that identifies a transaction

SUCCEEDED.comment: True when a transaction is successful, otherwise false.

metadata.name: FACT_TRANSACTIONS
metadata.comment: A table that contains high level information about every transaction on the Solana blockchain.

BLOCK_TIMESTAMP.name: BLOCK_TIMESTAMP
BLOCK_TIMESTAMP.comment: The date and time at which the block began.

BLOCK_ID.name: BLOCK_ID
BLOCK_ID.comment: Slot for which a block can be created.

TX_ID.name: TX_ID
TX_ID.comment: A unique key that identifies a transaction

SIGNERS.name: SIGNERS
SIGNERS.comment: List of accounts that signed the transaction

SUCCEEDED.name: SUCCEEDED
SUCCEEDED.comment: True when a transaction is successful, otherwise false.

ACCOUNT_KEYS.name: ACCOUNT_KEYS
ACCOUNT_KEYS.comment: List of accounts that are referenced by pre/post sol/token balances objects

PRE_BALANCES.name: PRE_BALANCES
PRE_BALANCES.comment: List of pre-transaction balances for different accounts

POST_BALANCES.name: POST_BALANCES
POST_BALANCES.comment: List of post-transaction balances for different accounts

PRE_TOKEN_BALANCES.name: PRE_TOKEN_BALANCES
PRE_TOKEN_BALANCES.comment: List of pre-transaction token balances for different token accounts

POST_TOKEN_BALANCES.name: POST_TOKEN_BALANCES
POST_TOKEN_BALANCES.comment: List of post-transaction token balances for different token accounts

LOG_MESSAGES.name: LOG_MESSAGES
LOG_MESSAGES.comment: Array of log messages written by the program for this transaction

UNITS_CONSUMED.name: UNITS_CONSUMED
UNITS_CONSUMED.comment: The number of compute units consumed by the program.

UNITS_LIMIT.name: UNITS_LIMIT
UNITS_LIMIT.comment: The max number of compute units that can be consumed by the program.

TX_SIZE.name: TX_SIZE
TX_SIZE.comment: The size of the transaction in bytes.

FACT_TRANSACTIONS_ID.name: FACT_TRANSACTIONS_ID
FACT_TRANSACTIONS_ID.comment: The unique identifier for each row in the table.

INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.name: INSERTED_TIMESTAMP
INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.comment: The timestamp at which the record was initially created and inserted into this table.

MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP.name: MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP
MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP.comment: The timestamp at which this record was last modified by an internal process.

metadata.name: FACT_STAKE_ACCOUNTS
metadata.comment: This table contains data for stake accounts by epoch, including the active amount staked, lockup information, and related information.

VOTE_PUBKEY.name: VOTE_PUBKEY
VOTE_PUBKEY.comment: Vote account of the validator this stake is delegated to

AUTHORIZED_STAKER.name: AUTHORIZED_STAKER
AUTHORIZED_STAKER.comment: Account responsible for signing stake delegations/deactivativations transactions

AUTHORIZED_WITHDRAWER.name: AUTHORIZED_WITHDRAWER
AUTHORIZED_WITHDRAWER.comment: Account responsible for signing any stake withdrawal transactions

LOCKUP.name: LOCKUP
LOCKUP.comment: Lockup information when tokens can be withdrawn

RENT_EXEMPT_RESERVE.name: RENT_EXEMPT_RESERVE
RENT_EXEMPT_RESERVE.comment: Minimum SOL balance that must be maintained for this account to remain rent exempt

DEACTIVATION_EPOCH.name: DEACTIVATION_EPOCH
DEACTIVATION_EPOCH.comment: Epoch when stake will be deactivated

WARMUP_COOLDOWN_RATE.name: WARMUP_COOLDOWN_RATE
WARMUP_COOLDOWN_RATE.comment: Rate at which stake can be activated/deactivated

RENT_EPOCH.name: RENT_EPOCH
RENT_EPOCH.comment: Epoch at which this account will next owe rent

FACT_STAKE_ACCOUNTS_ID.name: FACT_STAKE_ACCOUNTS_ID
FACT_STAKE_ACCOUNTS_ID.comment: The unique identifier for each row in the table.

INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.comment: The timestamp at which the record was initially created and inserted into this table.

MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP.comment: The timestamp at which this record was last modified by an internal process.

PURCHASER.comment: The wallet address that purchased the NFT

MINT_PRICE.name: MINT_PRICE
MINT_PRICE.comment: Price that it cost to mint the NFT in SOL or other currency.

MINT_CURRENCY.name: MINT_CURRENCY
MINT_CURRENCY.comment: Currency used to pay for the NFT mint.

MINT.name: MINT
MINT.comment: Unique address representing a specific token

IS_COMPRESSED.name: IS_COMPRESSED
IS_COMPRESSED.comment: Identifies whether the mint is a compressed NFT mint

metadata.comment: Table containing bridging actions on Wormhole, DeBridge and Mayan Finance

BLOCK_TIMESTAMP.name: BLOCK_TIMESTAMP
BLOCK_TIMESTAMP.comment: The date and time at which the block began.

BLOCK_ID.name: BLOCK_ID
BLOCK_ID.comment: Slot for which a block can be created.

TX_ID.name: TX_ID
TX_ID.comment: A unique key that identifies a transaction

SUCCEEDED.name: SUCCEEDED
SUCCEEDED.comment: True when a transaction is successful, otherwise false.

PROGRAM_ID.name: PROGRAM_ID
PROGRAM_ID.comment: An address that identifies the program that is being interacted with. I.E. which DEX for a swap or marketplace for an NFT sale.

DIRECTION.name: DIRECTION
DIRECTION.comment: Direction of the bridge - either inbound to Solana or outbound from Solana

USER_ADDRESS.name: USER_ADDRESS
USER_ADDRESS.comment: The address receiving or sending bridged tokens

AMOUNT.name: AMOUNT
AMOUNT.comment: The number of tokens sent during an event

MINT.name: MINT
MINT.comment: Unique address representing a specific token

FACT_BRIDGE_ACTIVITY_ID.name: FACT_BRIDGE_ACTIVITY_ID
FACT_BRIDGE_ACTIVITY_ID.comment: The unique identifier for each row in the table.

INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.name: INSERTED_TIMESTAMP
INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.comment: The timestamp at which the record was initially created and inserted into this table.

MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP.name: MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP
MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP.comment: The timestamp at which this record was last modified by an internal process.

AUTHORIZED_WITHDRAWER.comment: Account responsible for signing stake withdrawal transactions

RENT_EXEMPT_RESERVE.comment: Minimum SOL balance that must be maintained for this account to remain rent exempt

DEACTIVATION_EPOCH.name: DEACTIVATION_EPOCH
DEACTIVATION_EPOCH.comment: Epoch when stake will be deactivated

WARMUP_COOLDOWN_RATE.name: WARMUP_COOLDOWN_RATE
WARMUP_COOLDOWN_RATE.comment: Rate at which stake can be activated/deactivated

RENT_EPOCH.name: RENT_EPOCH

has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

BLOCK_TIMESTAMP.name: BLOCK_TIMESTAMP
BLOCK_TIMESTAMP.comment: The date and time at which the block began.

BLOCK_ID.name: BLOCK_ID
BLOCK_ID.comment: Slot for which a block can be created.

REWARD_AMOUNT_SOL.name: REWARD_AMOUNT_SOL
REWARD_AMOUNT_SOL.comment: The number of tokens sent during an event

POST_BALANCE_SOL.name: POST_BALANCE_SOL
POST_BALANCE_SOL.comment: The amount of SOL in the account after event

COMMISSION.name: COMMISSION
COMMISSION.comment: Percent of staking rewards paid to the validator

EPOCH_EARNED.name: EPOCH_EARNED
EPOCH_EARNED.comment: The epoch that rewards were recieved for. Staking and voting rewards for an epoch are recieved in the first block of the following epoch, so this would identify the prior epoch, which is where the rewards were determined. Fee and rent rewards are determined in the epoch they are recieved.

TX_ID.comment: A unique key that identifies a transaction

FROM_MINT.name: FROM_MINT

TO_MINT.name: TO_MINT
TO_MINT.comment: Token being received or swapped for

_INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.comment: Time the record was inserted into snowflake

CREATOR_ADDRESS.comment: address provided by the creator of the project where mint payments and secondary market royalties are sent

CREATOR_NAME.comment: name of the project creator - this can be an individual or a company name

IMAGE_URL.name: IMAGE_URL
IMAGE_URL.comment: URL that links to the image on the ipfs service

PROJECT_NAME.name: PROJECT_NAME
PROJECT_NAME.comment: Name of the project the NFT token belongs to

TOKEN_ID.name: TOKEN_ID
TOKEN_ID.comment: Numeric value that identifies the NFT within it's series

TOKEN_METADATA.name: TOKEN_METADATA
TOKEN_METADATA.comment: a block of json that describes the traits of an NFT

TOKEN_METADATA_URI.name: TOKEN_METADATA_URI
TOKEN_METADATA_URI.comment: URL that links to the token metadata on the ipfs service

TOKEN_NAME.name: TOKEN_NAME
TOKEN_NAME.comment: Name of the NFT token - this is unique to token. Example SMB #284

metadata.name: DIM_LABELS
metadata.comment: The labels table is a store of one-to-one address identifiers, or an address name. Labels are broken out into a "type" (such as cex, dex, dapp, games, etc.) and a "subtype" (ex: contract_deployer, hot_wallet, token_contract, etc.) in order to help classify each address name into similar groups. Our labels are sourced from many different places, but can primarily be grouped into two categories: automatic and manual. Automatic labels are continuously labeled based on certain criteria, such as a known contract deploying another contract, behavior based algorithms for finding deposit wallets, and consistent data pulls of custom protocol APIs. Manual labels are done periodically to find addresses that cannot be found programatically such as finding new protocol addresses, centralized exchange hot wallets, or trending addresses. Labels can also be added by our community by using our add-a-label tool (https://science.flipsidecrypto.xyz/add-a-label/) or on-chain with near (https://near.social/lord1.near/widget/Form) and are reviewed by our labels team. A label can be removed by our labels team if it is found to be incorrect or no longer relevant; this generally will only happen for mislabeled deposit wallets.

INSERT_DATE.name: INSERT_DATE
INSERT_DATE.comment: The date the label was inserted in the table

ADDRESS.name: ADDRESS
ADDRESS.comment: Address that the label is for. This is the field that should be used to join other tables with labels.

CREATOR.name: CREATOR
CREATOR.comment: The name of the creator of the label

LABEL_TYPE.name: LABEL_TYPE
LABEL_TYPE.comment: A high-level category describing the addresses main function or ownership

LABEL_SUBTYPE.name: LABEL_SUBTYPE
LABEL_SUBTYPE.comment: A sub-category nested within label type providing further detail

PROJECT_NAME.name: PROJECT_NAME
PROJECT_NAME.comment: Name of the controlling entity of the address

INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.name: INSERTED_TIMESTAMP
INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.comment: The utc timestamp at which the row was inserted into the table.

MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP.name: MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP
MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP.comment: The utc timestamp at which the row was last modified.

DIM_LABELS_ID.name: DIM_LABELS_ID
DIM_LABELS_ID.comment: The unique identifier for each row in the table.

has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

metadata.name: DIM_EVM_EVENT_ABIS
metadata.comment: This table contains the individual event abis for each all contracts that we have ABIs for. Proxies are rolled up to their implementation.

BLOCKCHAIN.name: BLOCKCHAIN

PARENT_CONTRACT_ADDRESS.name: PARENT_CONTRACT_ADDRESS
PARENT_CONTRACT_ADDRESS.comment: The address of the contract that the event abi is for.

SIMPLE_EVENT_NAME.name: SIMPLE_EVENT_NAME
SIMPLE_EVENT_NAME.comment: The name of the event along with its parameters.

EVENT_SIGNATURE.name: EVENT_SIGNATURE
EVENT_SIGNATURE.comment: The keccak256 signature of the simple event name. This can be used to filter for events in the logs table on topics[0].

START_BLOCK.name: START_BLOCK
START_BLOCK.comment: The block number of the creation of the contract containing the event. This could be from a proxy or an implementation.

END_BLOCK.name: END_BLOCK
END_BLOCK.comment: The block number before a similar event was created in the contract. This could be from a proxy or an implementation.

INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.name: INSERTED_TIMESTAMP
INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.comment: The utc timestamp at which the row was inserted into the table.

MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP.name: MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP
MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP.comment: The utc timestamp at which the row was last modified.

DIM_EVM_EVENT_ABIS_ID.name: DIM_EVM_EVENT_ABIS_ID
DIM_EVM_EVENT_ABIS_ID.comment: The unique identifier for each row in the table.

metadata.name: FACT_EVENT_LOGS
metadata.comment: This table contains flattened event logs from transactions on the Ethereum Blockchain. Transactions may have multiple events, which are denoted by the event index for a transaction hash. Therefore, this table is unique on the combination of transaction hash and event index. Please see `fact_decoded_event_logs` or `ez_decoded_event_logs` for the decoded event logs.

BLOCK_NUMBER.name: BLOCK_NUMBER
BLOCK_NUMBER.comment: Also known as block height. The block number, which indicates the length of the blockchain, increases after the addition of each new block.

BLOCK_TIMESTAMP.name: BLOCK_TIMESTAMP
BLOCK_TIMESTAMP.comment: The date and time at which the block was produced.

TX_HASH.name: TX_HASH
TX_HASH.comment: Transaction hash is a unique 66-character identifier that is generated when a transaction is executed. This field will not be unique in this table, as a given transaction can include multiple events.

ORIGIN_FUNCTION_SIGNATURE.name: ORIGIN_FUNCTION_SIGNATURE
ORIGIN_FUNCTION_SIGNATURE.comment: The function signature of this transaction.

ORIGIN_FROM_ADDRESS.name: ORIGIN_FROM_ADDRESS
ORIGIN_FROM_ADDRESS.comment: The from address at the transaction level.

ORIGIN_TO_ADDRESS.name: ORIGIN_TO_ADDRESS
ORIGIN_TO_ADDRESS.comment: The to address at the transaction level.

CONTRACT_ADDRESS.name: CONTRACT_ADDRESS
CONTRACT_ADDRESS.comment: The address interacted with for a given event.

EVENT_REMOVED.name: EVENT_REMOVED
EVENT_REMOVED.comment: Whether the event has been removed from the transaction.

_LOG_ID.name: _LOG_ID
_LOG_ID.comment: Deprecated. This column is no longer used. Please remove from your query by Jan. 10 2024.'

FACT_EVENT_LOGS_ID.name: FACT_EVENT_LOGS_ID
FACT_EVENT_LOGS_ID.comment: The unique identifier for each row in the table.

INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.name: INSERTED_TIMESTAMP
INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.comment: The utc timestamp at which the row was inserted into the table.

MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP.name: MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP
MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP.comment: The utc timestamp at which the row was last modified.

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

metadata.name: EZ_DECODED_EVENT_LOGS
metadata.comment:
'For information on how to submit a contract for decoding, as well as how ABIs are sourced, please visit [here](https://science.flipsidecrypto.xyz/abi-requestor/). This model contains decoded event logs for contracts that we have an ABI for. Please note, this table does not include all event logs, only those that we have an ABI for. The `decoded_log` column is the easiest place to query decoded data. It is a JSON object, where the keys are the names of the event parameters, and the values are the values of the event parameters. You can select from this column using the following sample format, `decoded_log:from::string` or more generally, `decoded_log:<event_param>::datatype`. See below for a full sample query. The `full_decoded_logs` column contains the same information, as well as additional fields such as the datatype of the decoded data. You may need to laterally flatten this column to query the data.
      
Sample query for USDC Transfer events:
```sql select  tx_hash, block_number, contract_address, decoded_log:from::string as from_address, decoded_log:to::string as to_address, decoded_log:value::integer as value from ethereum.core.fact_decoded_event_logs where contract_address = lower('0xA0b86991c6218b36c1d19D4a2e9Eb0cE3606eB48') and block_number between 16400000 and 16405000 and event_name = 'Transfer' limit 50```'

BLOCK_NUMBER.name: BLOCK_NUMBER
BLOCK_NUMBER.comment: Also known as block height. The block number, which indicates the length of the blockchain, increases after the addition of each new block.

BLOCK_TIMESTAMP.name: BLOCK_TIMESTAMP
BLOCK_TIMESTAMP.comment: The date and time at which the block was produced.

TX_HASH.name: TX_HASH
TX_HASH.comment: Transaction hash is a unique 66-character identifier that is generated when a transaction is executed. This field will not be unique in this table, as a given transaction can include multiple events.

CONTRACT_ADDRESS.name: CONTRACT_ADDRESS
CONTRACT_ADDRESS.comment: The address interacted with for a given event.

CONTRACT_NAME.name: CONTRACT_NAME
CONTRACT_NAME.comment: The name of the contract, if the contract has a name() function.

EVENT_NAME.name: EVENT_NAME
EVENT_NAME.comment: The name of the event, as defined in the contract ABI.

DECODED_LOG.name: DECODED_LOG
DECODED_LOG.comment: The flattened decoded log, where the keys are the names of the event parameters, and the values are the values of the event parameters.

FULL_DECODED_LOG.name: FULL_DECODED_LOG
FULL_DECODED_LOG.comment: The full decoded log, including the event name, the event parameters, and the data type of the event parameters.

ORIGIN_FUNCTION_SIGNATURE.name: ORIGIN_FUNCTION_SIGNATURE
ORIGIN_FUNCTION_SIGNATURE.comment: The function signature of this transaction.

ORIGIN_FROM_ADDRESS.name: ORIGIN_FROM_ADDRESS
ORIGIN_FROM_ADDRESS.comment: The from address at the transaction level.

ORIGIN_TO_ADDRESS.name: ORIGIN_TO_ADDRESS
ORIGIN_TO_ADDRESS.comment: The to address at the transaction level.

EVENT_REMOVED.name: EVENT_REMOVED
EVENT_REMOVED.comment: Whether the event has been removed from the transaction.

EZ_DECODED_EVENT_LOGS_ID.name: EZ_DECODED_EVENT_LOGS_ID
EZ_DECODED_EVENT_LOGS_ID.comment: The unique identifier for each row in the table.

INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.name: INSERTED_TIMESTAMP
INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.comment: The utc timestamp at which the row was inserted into the table.

MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP.name: MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP
MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP.comment: The utc timestamp at which the row was last modified.

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table
